column13:
The following are questions about menstruation.

Where do you think the bleeding from menstruation originates? (Select one)
column14: Did you have school-based menstrual education?
column15: How well-informed did you feel in regard to menstruation after your school-based menstrual education?
column16: What words would you use to describe periods generally?
column17: How comfortable are you with discussing your own or others' periods?
column18: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - People should feel comfortable having sex on their period.
column19: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Menstrual blood is dirty.
column20: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Menarche (a person's very first period) is reason for celebration.
column21: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - While on menstruation, one should refrain from some religious activities.
column22: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Code words should be used to describe periods ("Aunt Flow"; "time of the month").
column23: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - People can become more irritable and depressed due to period-related needs.
column24: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Menstruation is a normal and healthy part of life.
column25: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - It is normal to have really painful periods.
column26: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Menstruation is a symbol of feminine beauty.
column27: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Menstrual products should be hidden since they are private, hygiene products.
column28: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Menstrual cramps are often exaggerated.
column29: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Menstrual leave/absence (being able to take time off work or school due to menstruation) should be available.
column30: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - The use of insert-type menstrual products (i.e., tampons, menstrual cups) may cause a loss of virginity.
column31: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - Reusable (cloth) menstrual pads are unsanitary.
column32: Do you agree or disagree with the following statements? - All menstrual products are expensive.
column33:
The following questions are about your direct experiences with period products.

Have you ever provided or purchased a period product for someone else?
column34: Have you ever not been able to afford menstrual products (such as pads or tampons)?
column35: In the last 12 months, how often have you not been able to afford menstrual products?
column36: Do you think people avoid changing menstrual products while on campus?
column37: What are some reasons you think people don't change their menstrual product on campus? (Select all that apply).
column38: Do you think people have ever missed, had to leave, or arrived late for class because of menstrual-related reasons? (Select all that apply).
